description_long: This handbag features a rectangular body with a two-tone design: the upper section is a dark gray fabric, while the lower section is a light tan material with visible diagonal stitching, adding a subtle decorative touch. The bag is equipped with a long, thin, white strap that attaches to the top corners via small metal rings, making it suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear. The side views reveal a slim profile and a zipper closure running along the top edge, ensuring secure storage of personal items. The stitching on the tan section forms a diamond pattern, providing a touch of visual interest without being overly ornate. The overall construction suggests a soft, flexible structure, likely made from fabric and synthetic leather. There are no visible brand logos or additional decorative elements, giving the bag a minimalist and versatile appearance.
description: A rectangular, two-tone handbag with a dark gray upper section, tan lower section with diamond stitching, and a long white strap. Features a top zipper closure and a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full two-tone face, diamond-stitched tan lower section, and attachment points for the white strap.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim profile, the zipper running along the top, and the strap attachment hardware.
description_view_2: Back view mirroring the front, with the same two-tone color scheme and diamond stitching on the tan section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile, zipper, and strap attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Single long white strap, suitable for shoulder or crossbody wear, attached at top corners with metal rings, not visibly adjustable.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Zipper closure running along the top edge of the bag.
attribute_pattern: Diamond stitching pattern on the tan lower section; otherwise plain.
